Sonority

Home-theater layouts, speaker groups and one-tap profiles for Sonos that the official app won't create.

View on GitHub

Your whole
Sonos system

Home theaters, speaker groups and every room — at a glance.

Dedicated
front speakers

Add discrete front L / R to your soundbar — a home theater the Sonos app won’t build.

Stereo pairs,
zones & more

Bond any speakers into one room — even mismatched models the app blocks.

Save & restore
your layouts

Snapshot your setup and rebuild fronts, surrounds and groups in one tap.

Privacy Policy Support GitHub

Sonority is an independent app and is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by Sonos, Inc. "Sonos" is a trademark of Sonos, Inc.
